images.prompt: Create a single-frame cartoon illustration in flat vector style with clean outlines, bright saturated colors, simple friendly shapes, and a white background. The scene depicts: It's important to show fairness when we share our blocks with friends.. Do not include any text, letters, or words in the image.

Create a single-frame cartoon illustration in flat vector style with clean outlines, bright saturated colors, simple friendly shapes, and a white background. The scene depicts: When we shared the cookies so everyone got two, that was fairness!. Do not include any text, letters, or words in the image.

Create a single-frame cartoon illustration in flat vector style with clean outlines, bright saturated colors, simple friendly shapes, and a white background. The scene depicts: When we share snacks, Mom always shows fairness by giving everyone the same amount.. Do not include any text, letters, or words in the image.

G1.definition: Fairness means everyone gets treated the same, like when everyone gets a turn or an equal share.
G1.example: When we share snacks, Mom always shows fairness by giving everyone the same amount.
G1.tryIt: Can you think of a time when you or a friend showed fairness when playing a game?

K.definition: Fairness means everyone gets treated in a way that feels good and equal, like everyone gets a turn.
K.example: When we shared the cookies so everyone got two, that was fairness!
K.tryIt: Today, try to show fairness when you play with your friends by sharing your toys!

preK.definition: Fairness means everyone gets what's right or what's their turn, so no one feels left out.
preK.example: It's important to show fairness when we share our blocks with friends.
preK.tryIt: Next time you play, try to share your toys fairly with everyone!
